case_title: KOVACS,JOHN G. VS STANAWAY,DONALD F. EXECUTOR OF RONALD W.EDGEMAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,591.76 FILED BY KOVACS,JOHN G. AS TO DEFENDANT STANAWAY,DONALD F. EXECUTOR OF RONALD W.EDGEMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOVACS,JOHN G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STANAWAY,DONALD F. EXECUTOR OF RONALD W.EDGEMAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
DONALD STANAWAY CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED.
